sections.paragraph:
σύμμορφος, ον (s. prec. and next entry; Ps.-Lucian, Amor. 39 al.) pert. to having a similar form, nature, or style, similar in form τινός as or to someth. (ς. τοῦ θανάτου αὐτοῦ Orig., C. Cels. 2, 69, 16; B-D-F §182, 1; Rob. 504; 528) σύμμ. τῆς εἰκόνος τοῦ υἱοῦ αὐτοῦ like his Son in form or appearance Ro 8:29 (JKürzinger, BZ 2, ’58, 294–99). Also w. the dat. (Nicander [II b.c.], Ther. 321 ed. OSchneider [1856]; Heraclit. Sto. 77 p. 102, 12 ς. τρισὶ θεοῖς of Agamemnon; B-D-F §194, 2; Rob. 528) σύμμ. τῷ σώματι τῆς δόξης αὐτοῦ Phil 3:21.—DELG s.v. μορφή. TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

Ps.-Lucian Ps.-Lucian , after II a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

someth. someth. = something

Orig Orig , var. works, II–III a.d.—List 5

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

BZ BZ = Biblische Zeitschrift—List 6

dat. dat. = dative

Nicander Nicander , III/II b.c.—List 5

  1. ed. = edited (by), edition

Heraclit. Sto. Heraclit. Sto. = Heraclitus the Stoic, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 958
